items.description: Custom cursor demo with Sora icons and shape variants.

items.description: Apple-style dock navigation demo with app icons.

items.name: hooks-use-auto-height
items.title: useAutoHeight
items.description: A hook that allows you to automatically adjust the height of an element based on its content.

items.name: hooks-use-controlled-state
items.title: useControlledState
items.description: A hook that allows you to control a state.

items.name: hooks-use-prefers-reduced-motion
items.title: usePrefersReducedMotion
items.description: A hook that tracks the OS-level Reduced Motion setting live, so GSAP-driven primitives can skip or shortcut their animations.

items.name: lib-ease
items.title: Ease & Spring Tokens
items.description: Shared cubic-bezier eases and Motion spring presets (press, swap, panel, layout, mouse) used across primitives to keep motion consistent.

items.name: lib-get-strict-context
items.title: getStrictContext
items.description: A hook that allows you to create a strict context.

items.name: lib-scroll-trigger-utils
items.title: Scroll Trigger Utils
items.description: Shared GSAP ScrollTrigger helpers (window/scroller detection, ready/resize waiting) used by scroll-driven primitives.

items.name: char-stagger-button
items.title: Char Stagger Button
items.description: A button with per-character stagger animation on hover.

items.name: section-cta
items.title: Section CTA
items.description: A chip-style call-to-action link with a Motion-powered sliding label and rotating icon chips on hover.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: An animated FAQ accordion with expandable panels, powered by Motion.

items.name: border-trail
items.title: Border Trail
items.description: Animated border spotlight that travels around a rounded container, powered by Motion.

items.name: cursor-bubble
items.title: Cursor Bubble
items.description: A floating label that follows the cursor and elastic-pops into view over interactive targets, powered by GSAP.

items.name: cursor-trail-reveal
items.title: Cursor Trail Reveal
items.description: Desktop cursor trail that reveals staggered image strips with clip-path wipes as the pointer moves.

items.name: custom-cursor
items.title: Custom Cursor
items.description: A smooth custom cursor that morphs when hovering interactive targets, powered by Motion.

items.name: dock-nav
items.title: Dock Nav
items.description: An Apple-style dock navigation bar with Motion-powered expanding icons and tooltips on hover.

items.name: highlight
items.title: Highlight
items.description: A Motion-powered highlight effect that allows you to highlight elements on hover, click or with a controlled value.

items.name: infinite-scrolling-images
items.title: Infinite Scrolling Images
items.description: An infinite card stack that advances with wheel, touch, or keyboard input using spring-based Motion transitions.

items.name: logo-carousel-swapper
items.title: Logo Carousel Swapper
items.description: Staggered logo column swapper with fade, vertical shift, and motion blur powered by Motion.

items.name: magnetic-cards
items.title: Magnetic Cards
items.description: A fanned stack of cards that fling away from the cursor on release, with GSAP InertiaPlugin easing each one back to rest.

items.name: pixelated-image-reveal
items.title: Pixelated Image Reveal
items.description: An image card that reveals a second image through a randomized pixel grid on hover, powered by Motion.

items.name: progressive-blur
items.title: Progressive Blur
items.description: A stacked-layer blur that ramps smoothly from sharp to fully blurred toward an edge, for fading content under a fixed header or above a scroll boundary.

items.name: scroll-gallery
items.title: Scroll Gallery
items.description: A full-viewport sticky scroll slider with strip-mask image transitions and animated title swaps, driven by GSAP ScrollTrigger.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: A loading placeholder with shimmer or fade variants, plus a transition that crossfades into real content once loading finishes.

items.name: sticky-scroll-cards
items.title: Sticky Scroll Cards
items.description: Scroll-pinned hero where a front card flips to reveal a stack of back cards, dismissed one at a time as you keep scrolling.

items.name: bottom-sheet
items.title: Bottom Sheet
items.description: A draggable, snap-point bottom sheet built on Radix Dialog for accessibility, with Motion driving the drag gesture and glide.

items.name: draw-underline-link
items.title: Draw Underline Link
items.description: A link with a hand-drawn SVG underline that animates on hover, powered by Motion.

items.name: number-flow
items.title: Number Flow
items.description: An animated, digit-by-digit number counter with a smooth rolling odometer effect, powered by Motion.

items.name: text-effect
items.title: Text Effect
items.description: Preset-driven staggered text reveals with blur, fade, slide, and scale animations, powered by Motion.

items.name: text-morph
items.title: Text Morph
items.description: Per-character layout morphing for labels, counters, and live text swaps, powered by Motion.

items.name: text-reveal-block
items.title: Text Reveal (Block)
items.description: Line-by-line text reveal with a colored block wipe, powered by GSAP SplitText.

text.value: Framed in shadow and light, every line arrives with deliberate tension.

items.name: text-reveal-box
items.title: Text Reveal Box
items.description: Scroll-pinned word-by-word text reveal with a highlight flash, powered by GSAP ScrollTrigger.

items.name: text-reveal-mask
items.title: Text Reveal (Mask)
items.description: A scroll-triggered masked slide-up text reveal animation, powered by Motion.

text.value: Every stride is a statement. Every finish line a new beginning. We build gear for athletes who refuse to settle for yesterday's pace. Push beyond limits. Outrun expectations. This is where champions are made.

items.name: text-roll
items.title: Text Roll
items.description: A per-character vertical text roll animation for label swaps and micro-interactions, powered by Motion.

items.name: text-scramble
items.title: Text Scramble
items.description: A text scramble reveal animation that decodes characters on mount or when re-triggered, powered by Motion.

items.name: text-underline
items.title: Text Underline
items.description: A CSS-only link underline that slides through on hover.
